title: malaxis auriculata
intro: Malaxis auriculata, commonly known as the earleaf twayblade, is a species of orchid that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. It is native to tropical and subtropical regions of Asia and is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine. The plant has been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. Malaxis auriculata can be prepared as a tea or a decoction, and is also used in herbal remedies such as infusions and tinctures.
